state_reconciliation.latest_sealed_receipts_current_state: Gate C is exited. Gate D remains bounded and ordered. The B04 launch surface is intact, R1 ratified crucible and pressure law, R2 ratified adapter lifecycle law, R3 ratified the bounded selection arena, R4 ratified explainable router shadow evaluation, and the original R5 plus all three counted same-head R5 reruns held the static baseline honestly because router superiority was not earned. next_counted_workstream_scope: B04.R6 is next in order only and remains blocked in law because the third same-head rerun of B04.R5 did not earn router superiority on head 79759969c402205f5c99be48524c2f5489f72019. explicit_non_go_areas: Do not widen externality beyond E1.
Do not open external comparative claims.
Do not treat the second same-head B04.R5 rerun as learned-router authorization or lobe ratification.
Do not treat LAB_READINESS_CEILING_FROZEN as counted readiness or a reopening trigger.

Do not prepare a later router-readiness reconsideration input via any alternate tool, helper, wrapper, or packet emitter outside KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/tools/router/run_router_readiness_reconsideration_input.py.
Do not parse or rely on kt.router_readiness_reconsideration_input.v1 through any downstream path outside KT_PROD_CLEANROOM/tools/operator/router_readiness_reconsideration_input_validate.py.
Do not add any future tool-side touch of kt.router_readiness_reconsideration_input.v1 outside the sanctioned emitter/consumer pair while the single-path enforcement receipt is the standing guard.
Do not prepare or consume a future router-readiness reconsideration input using a stale single-path enforcement receipt from another head.
Do not prepare or consume a future router-readiness reconsideration input without a fresh same-head dual receipts on the actual candidate head, including the preserved-basis receipt.
Do not treat PRE_SEAL_HOLD_STATE_BASIS_CONFIRMED as same-head authority or as sufficient for reconsideration prepare or consume.
Do not let tracked carrier receipts stand in for current-head authority.
Do not bypass the ordered Gate D ratification sequence.
Do not treat a validated lab-only router-readiness reconsideration input as counted reopening, R5 relaunch, or R6 movement by itself.
Do not treat a PASS router-readiness reconsideration adjudication receipt as a counted launch surface, an R5 rerun, or learned-router authorization.
Do not treat the third same-head B04.R5 rerun launch surface as a rerun result, learned-router authorization, or lobe ratification.
Do not treat a PASS third same-head B04.R5 rerun procedure as earned superiority, learned-router authorization, or lobe ratification.
Do not treat the post-third-rerun reconsideration adjudication receipt as a counted launch surface, a fourth R5 rerun, or learned-router authorization.
Do not treat READY_FOR_SEPARATE_COUNTED_R5_FOURTH_SAME_HEAD_RERUN_LAUNCH_SURFACE_CONSIDERATION as counted reopening by itself.
